acolyte.description: You devoted yourself to service in a temple, learning sacred rites and providing sacrifices to the god or gods you worship.
acolyte.name: Acolyte

criminal.description: You eked out a living in dark alleyways, cutting purses or burgling shops. Perhaps you were part of a small gang of like-minded criminals.
criminal.name: Criminal

sage.description: You spent your formative years traveling between manors and monasteries, studying various tomes and learning the lore of the multiverse.
sage.name: Sage

soldier.description: You began training for war as soon as you reached adulthood. You might have been part of a standing army, a mercenary company, or a local militia.
soldier.name: Soldier
